site.builtFor: Imejengwa kwa ajili ya huduma za afya kwa wakimbizi

landing.badge: Inaaminika na kliniki Kakuma na Kalobeyei
landing.headline: Huduma za afya bila kusubiri.
landing.subhead: Weka miadi, ona nafasi yako kwenye foleni, tafuta kliniki, na piga simu ya dharura — kwa lugha yako.
landing.featuresSub: Imeundwa kwa maeneo yenye mtandao wa chini na jamii za lugha nyingi.

queue.t: Tikiti za foleni moja kwa moja
queue.b: Pata tikiti ya kidijitali na ona nafasi yako ikisasishwa.

clinics.b: Pata kliniki au duka la dawa lililo karibu kwenye ramani.

sos.b: Bonyeza moja inawajulisha wafanyakazi wa afya na mahali ulipo.

edu.b: Habari za uaminifu kuhusu usafi, lishe, na afya ya uzazi.

lang.b: Inasaidia Kiingereza, Kiswahili, Kifaransa, na Kiarabu.

secure.b: Akaunti zilizosimbwa na rekodi za faragha za wagonjwa.

register.b: Sajili kwa nambari ya simu kwa chini ya dakika moja.

book.b: Chagua kliniki na upate nambari yako mara moja.

visit.b: Fuatilia foleni popote — kuja tu wakati zamu yako.

landing.ctaTitle: Tayari kuchukua udhibiti wa afya yako?
landing.ctaBody: Bure. Bila karatasi. Inafanya kazi kwenye simu yoyote.

about.intro: AfyaConnect imejengwa kuleta huduma za kidijitali za afya kwa kambi za wakimbizi.

mission.b: Kufanya huduma za afya ziwe haraka na zenye heshima kwa kila mtu.

vision.b: Dunia ambayo hakuna anayesubiri masaa kwa huduma anayohitaji.

about.outro: Tunashirikiana na kliniki, NGOs, na wahudumu wa afya wa jamii.

auth.name: Jina Kamili
auth.loginSub: [NEEDS:sw] Sign in to manage your appointments and health.
auth.joinSub: [NEEDS:sw] Join thousands of patients getting faster, fairer care.
auth.signupHint: [NEEDS:sw] Sign up with your email or phone number.
auth.phoneOrEmailHint: [NEEDS:sw] Provide at least one — phone or email.
auth.phoneOrEmailRequired: [NEEDS:sw] Please provide a phone number or email.
auth.benefit1: [NEEDS:sw] Skip the line with digital tickets
auth.benefit2: [NEEDS:sw] Find the nearest clinic in seconds
auth.benefit3: [NEEDS:sw] Get help in your own language
auth.forgotSub: [NEEDS:sw] Enter your phone or email and we'll send you a reset link.
auth.resetSentBody: [NEEDS:sw] If an account exists for that phone or email, a reset link is on its way.
auth.devTokenBody: [NEEDS:sw] No email service is configured. Use this one-time token to reset your password now:
auth.resetSub: [NEEDS:sw] Paste the token you received and set a new password.
auth.tokenInvalid: [NEEDS:sw] This reset token is invalid or has expired.

home.subtitle: [NEEDS:sw] Here's what's happening with your care today.
home.viewLive: [NEEDS:sw] Tap to see live queue progress.

education.title: Elimu ya Afya
education.intro: [NEEDS:sw] Trusted, evidence-based health information — reviewed against guidance from leading global health organisations. Tap any topic to read more and see the original sources.
education.resourcesSub: [NEEDS:sw] Research and guidance from WHO, UNHCR and partner health organisations.
education.disclaimer: [NEEDS:sw] External links open on the partner organisation’s own website. AfyaConnect is not responsible for the content of external sites. For personal medical advice, speak to a clinician.

sos.confirmBody: Wafanyakazi wa afya watajulishwa mara moja na mahali ulipo.
